title: CounterbalancingRules
description: Machine-enforceable constraints on stimulus set composition. StimulusLibrary.check_counterbalancing() reads this file.

SemanticMatching.description: Rules for a valid SemanticMatching stimulus set.

set_size.description: Minimum and recommended total planches per session.

left_right_balance.description: Neither side should appear as correct answer in more than 60% of planches. Target: 50/50.

category_coverage.description: Each semantic category present in the set must appear at least twice to avoid single-instance bias.

difficulty_distribution.recommendation: Include at least 20% easy (1-2) and 20% hard (4-5) planches when difficulty is rated.
difficulty_distribution.description: Optional. Only enforced if all planches carry a difficulty rating.

FamousFace.description: Rules for a valid FamousFace stimulus set.

set_size.description: Minimum and recommended total planches per session.

category_coverage.description: Each person category present in the set must appear at least twice.

era_coverage.recommendation: Include faces from at least two distinct fame eras to probe different memory windows.
era_coverage.description: Optional. Helps ensure stimuli span the patient's life period.

UnknownFace.description: Rules for a valid UnknownFace stimulus set. All faces must be genuinely unknown; false positives (patient says 'yes') are clinically significant errors.

set_size.description: Minimum and recommended total planches per session.

age_group_balance.description: Each age group must represent at least 20% of the set.

gender_presentation_balance.description: Masculine and feminine presentations must each represent at least 30% of the set.
